summary: P4 WhatsApp Admin API + P5 Service Worker v3 Testing - ALL 19 TESTS PASSED. Verified all WhatsApp admin endpoints (status, templates CRUD, logs) with auth protection, and service worker v3 caching configuration.
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp service has proper retry logic (max_retries=2) with exponential backoff for 429 rate limits
All WhatsApp admin endpoints properly protected with verify_token dependency
Template CRUD operations exclude MongoDB _id correctly with {'_id': 0} projection
Service worker v3 correctly separates static cache (lexa-static-v3) and API cache (lexa-api-v1)
API cache has proper 5-minute TTL with stale-while-revalidate strategy
NEVER_CACHE correctly excludes /api/admin, /api/auth, and /api/bookings from caching
seed_data_creation: Test templates prefixed with TEST_ were created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp admin API fully functional with: GET /status (returns enabled/has_token/templates/recent_messages/total_sent/total_failed), GET/POST /templates, PUT /templates/{name}?status={status}, DELETE /templates/{name}, GET /logs. 3 seeded templates exist: lead_notification (approved), booking_confirmation (pending), project_update (pending). Service worker v3 deployed with API caching (stale-while-revalidate, 5min TTL) and static caching (cache-first). Note: /api/admin/whatsapp/test endpoint exists but sends real messages - NOT tested to avoid sending real WhatsApp messages.

tests_executed.test: Status: returns enabled, has_token, templates, recent_messages, total_sent, total_failed
Templates: list returns 3 seeded templates (lead_notification, booking_confirmation, project_update)
Logs: returns list of message entries
SW: contains lexa-static-v3 and lexa-api-v1 cache names
SW: has API_CACHE_PATTERNS for solutions, projects, articles
